name: music-production-ai
description: Music Production Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: generate_chord_progression
tools.description: Generate a chord progression in a given key and style.

tools.name: find_key
tools.description: Detect the musical key from a set of notes.

tools.name: analyze_lyrics
tools.description: Analyze song lyrics for structure, rhyme scheme, syllable count, and themes.

tools.name: mixing_recommendations
tools.description: Get mixing and mastering recommendations for a multitrack session.
